clips.title: The Alley
clips.prompt: Film-noir photoreal, high-contrast grade. A wet backstreet alley at night, a single buzzing streetlight, fire escapes, steam. Night, tense. A person in a trench coat and hat stands mid-alley, collar up, watchful. The camera rolls into a strong canted Dutch angle, tilting the horizon for unease. Hard streetlight, deep shadow, wet reflections, 35mm, dutch tilt roll. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Deadline
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, frantic grade. A chaotic open-plan newsroom, screens and papers everywhere, people rushing, phones ringing. Day, high energy. A person in a rolled-sleeve shirt and tie stands amid the chaos gripping a document. The camera rolls into a canted Dutch angle, tilting to amplify the frenzy. Cool overhead light, busy motion, 35mm, dutch tilt roll. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Neon Lean
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk style, saturated neon grade. A rain-soaked neon alley at night, glowing signs, puddles, steam. Night. A person in a sleek techwear jacket leans against a wall under the signs. The camera rolls into a bold canted Dutch angle, tilting the neon world sideways. Neon magenta and cyan, wet reflections, 35mm, dutch tilt roll. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Rough Seas
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, stormy grade. The pitching deck of a ship in a heavy storm, spray and rain, ropes and rails, grey churning sea. Day, violent weather. A person in oilskin foul-weather gear grips a rail against the pitch. The camera rolls into a strong canted Dutch angle matching the ship's list. Cold desaturated light, driving rain, 35mm, dutch tilt roll. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Room
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A bare interrogation room, a metal table, a single hanging bulb, a two-way mirror. Night, oppressive. A person in a plain shirt sits at the table under the lamp, tense. The camera rolls into a canted Dutch angle, tilting the room for unease. Hard overhead bulb, deep shadow, 40mm, dutch tilt roll. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Chase
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, kinetic grade. A subway platform at night, tiled walls, a train blurring past, harsh fluorescents. Night, urgent. A person in a hooded jacket sprints down the platform. The camera rolls into a dynamic canted Dutch angle, tilting to heighten the urgency of the run. Cold fluorescent light, motion blur, 35mm, dutch tilt roll. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.
